{{Infobox book
| name = Wintersteel
| slug = cradle-08-wintersteel
| precedes = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
| follows = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
| cover = [[File:Cover-cradle-08-wintersteel.jpg|250px]]
| released = 2020
| isbn = 9781734958119
| publisher = Audible Studios on Brilliance
| pages = 520
}}

== Plot summary ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The story begins in [[Sacred Valley]], where the [[Sage]] [[Timaias Adama]] is ambushed by [[Heaven's Glory]] elders. In a desperate attempt to save his apprentice, [[Yerin]], [[Adama]] uses a spatial rift to send her away before being overwhelmed. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] navigates the complexities of the Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament under the guidance of [[Northstrider]]. After testing [[Dross]] with an oracle codex, [[Lindon]] is permitted to attend a meeting of [[Monarchs]] where it is revealed that the [[Abidan]] messenger [[Kiuran]] has accelerated the tournament due to the impending awakening of the [[Wandering Titan]]. As [[Lindon]] learns about [[hunger madra]] through [[Dross]]'s stolen memories, his friends—[[Yerin]], [[Eithan]], and [[Mercy]]—prepare for their respective roles in the escalating conflict.

The tournament progresses with high-stakes matches: Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius decisively defeats [[Sha Miara]], while [[Mercy]] and Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara engage in a brutal rivalry. [[Lindon]] observes shocking victories, such as [[Yan Shoumei]]'s consumption of [[Blacksword]], and feels the mounting pressure of the competition. Following a dispute over [[Yerin]]'s training, [[Northstrider]] grants the [[Blood Sage]] permission to tutor her. As the competitors depart for intensive training—[[Mercy]] mastering the [[Dream of Darkness]], [[Yerin]] undergoing combat training at the Frozen Blade school{{!}}Frozen Blade sect, and [[Eithan]] advancing to Overlord—[[Lindon]] focuses on perfecting his '[[Consume]]' technique. He eventually joins the battlefield of the [[Wandering Titan]] at [[Sky's Edge]], where he leads an [[Underlord]] team and utilizes new [[Soulsmithing]] constructs to survive high-stakes missions.

As the tournament intensifies, [[Eithan]] negotiates with the Lion Emperor to protect [[House Arelius]], while [[Yerin]] faces confrontations with [[Dreadgod cultists]]. [[Lindon]] develops a prototype armor to survive raids by [[Abyssal Palace cultists]], even declining a marriage alliance from the [[Akura clan]] to remain focused on [[Yerin]]. The tournament reaches a fever pitch as [[Mercy]] suffers a fatal defeat against Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara, and [[Yerin]] struggles with her [[Blood Shadow]] before ultimately winning her match against [[Calan Archer]]. Amidst this, [[Lindon]] forms a new contract with [[Little Blue]] and prepares for the [[Dreadgod]]'s arrival.

The climax unfolds as [[Yerin]] bonds with her [[Blood Shadow]], naming it [[Ruby]], and eventually defeats [[Yan Shoumei]]. While [[Lindon]] attempts to harvest [[madra]] from the [[Wandering Titan]], he receives a terrifying vision: the [[Dreadgod]] is heading directly for [[Sacred Valley]]. In the arena, [[Yerin]] faces Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara in a tragic struggle that initially results in her death; however, [[Yerin]] recklessly fuses her spirit with [[Ruby]], transforming into a [[Herald]]-level entity to secure her victory as the eighteenth [[Uncrowned King]]. Simultaneously, [[Akura Fury]] ascends to [[Monarch]] status, triggering a massive battle in [[Ninecloud City]]. In the ensuing chaos, the [[Blood Sage]] kidnaps [[Mercy]] and [[Pride]], forcing [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]] into a desperate fight. The conflict concludes with [[Yerin]] killing the [[Dragon King]], [[Seshethkunaaz]], and [[Lindon]] defeating Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara by consuming her power, manifesting the [[Void Icon]] and earning a [[wintersteel badge]]. The survivors regroup and prepare to depart for their home in [[Sacred Valley]].}}

== Chapter-by-chapter ==
* '''Chapter 1:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Timaias Adama]], the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]], survives a grueling expedition through a [[labyrinth]] in [[Sacred Valley]] only to be ambushed and stabbed by the local [[Heaven's Glory]] elders. Despite his weakened state, he fights to protect his apprentice, [[Yerin]], while attempting to reach the [[Ancestor's Tomb]] to use its [[hunger madra]] as a defense. In a final act of desperation, [[Adama]] uses his remaining Authority{{!}}authority to tear open a spatial rift to forcibly send [[Yerin]] away before he is overwhelmed by the attackers.}}
* '''Chapter 2:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After [[Northstrider]] tests [[Dross]] with the oracle codex and deems him successful, he attempts to take the spirit away, forcing [[Lindon]] to use his full spiritual power to maintain their connection. [[Northstrider]] eventually allows [[Lindon]] to follow him into a meeting of [[Monarchs]], where an [[Abidan]] messenger named [[Kiuran]] arrives to accelerate the Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament due to the impending awakening of the [[Wandering Titan]]. Following the meeting, [[Northstrider]] promises [[Lindon]] that the competitors are under his protection and encourages him to train harder to influence the tournament's outcome.}}
* '''Chapter 3:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After returning to the [[Akura]] suite, [[Lindon]] reunites with [[Yerin]], [[Eithan]], and [[Mercy]], where he reveals that the competitor [[Sha Miara]] is actually a [[Monarch]] in disguise. Following a visit from [[Akura Fury]], which confirms the presence of a [[Monarch]] and rumors of a stirring [[Dreadgod]], [[Lindon]] discusses the escalating stakes of the tournament with his friends. Later that night, [[Dross]] shares a stolen memory of [[Northstrider]]'s ascension to [[Monarch]], providing [[Lindon]] with invaluable insights into the nature of [[hunger madra]] and the transition between power levels.}}
* '''Chapter 4:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius reveals his inner doubts to [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] before entering the arena, where he faces [[Sha Miara]], the [[Ninecloud Court]]'s champion. Using superior skill and strategic techniques, [[Eithan]] decisively defeats [[Miara]] in a nine-second battle that shocks the spectators. Meanwhile, Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara attempts a dangerous advancement to Overlord under her grandmother's supervision, narrowly avoiding permanent spiritual damage.}}
* '''Chapter 5:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As the Akura clan{{!}}Akura family prepares to depart for the [[Dreadgod]], [[Lindon]] discusses the upcoming tournament and his feelings for [[Yerin]] with [[Mercy]]. During the matches, [[Ziel]] decisively defeats [[Therian Nills]], and [[Mercy]] uses a sophisticated combination of techniques to secure a victory against [[Ulrok Crag-Strider]]. Following her win, [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] arrange a non-training date for the upcoming evening.}}
* '''Chapter 6:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After a formal dinner where [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are recognized as [[Uncrowned]] guests, they watch the tournament matches from the stands. They witness [[Yan Shoumei]]'s shocking victory over [[Blacksword]] when her [[Blood Shadow]] consumes him, and later observe Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara's overwhelming display of power as she obliterates [[Juvari]]. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and [[Mercy]] feeling the immense pressure of the competition as they realize the strength of their opponents.}}
* '''Chapter 7:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After the [[Winter Sage]] and [[Blood Sage]] clash over who should train [[Yerin Arelius]], [[Northstrider]] intervenes and ultimately grants the [[Blood Sage]] permission to tutor her. During the [[Uncrowned ceremony]], [[Lindon]] observes his friends receiving their Broken Crowns while contemplating how to advance his own power. Seeking guidance, [[Lindon]] meets with [[Northstrider]], who demonstrates the '[[Consume]]' technique and instructs him to train independently before the upcoming [[Akura expedition]].}}
* '''Chapter 8:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As [[Yerin]], [[Mercy]], and [[Eithan]] depart for their respective training journeys, [[Lindon]] bids them farewell at the cloudship dock and receives advice from [[Eithan]] regarding his advancement. [[Mercy]] begins rigorous training with [[Charity]] to master the [[Dream of Darkness]] technique, while [[Yerin]] arrives at the Frozen Blade school{{!}}Frozen Blade sect to undergo intensive combat and foundation training under the [[Winter Sage]]. Meanwhile, [[Eithan]] returns to a hidden Arelius family{{!}}Arelius bunker and advances to Overlord after reflecting on his revelation.}}
* '''Chapter 9:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] spends several days in the [[Ninecloud Court]] practicing his [[Consume]] technique, studying theory, and developing new techniques with [[Dross]]'s assistance. He eventually agrees to forgo an [[Archlord]] [[Soulsmith inheritance]] in exchange for [[Akura Charity]] transporting him to the battlefield of the [[Wandering Titan]]. Upon arriving at the devastated town of [[Sky's Edge]], [[Charity]] leaves [[Lindon]] under the supervision of the [[Seishen King]], [[Dakata]], while she goes to meet with other leaders.}}
* '''Chapter 10:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After escaping the [[Seishen Kingdom]] to avoid detection, [[Lindon]] spends his time in a cave perfecting his new [[Consume]] and [[Hollow Domain]] techniques with the help of [[Dross]] and [[Little Blue]]. When [[Akura Fury]] arrives to organize teams for a bounty system, [[Lindon]] is appointed leader of an [[Underlord]] team and immediately takes command to maximize point collection. He successfully leads [[Naru Saeya]] on a high-stakes mission, using [[Soulsmithing]] to create powerful constructs that allow them to slay a [[Lord]]-stage dreadbeasts{{!}}dreadbeast and begin rescuing survivors.}}
* '''Chapter 11:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius meets with the Lion Emperor, [[Reigan Shen]], in the ruins of his homeland to negotiate a deal that provides protection and resources for [[House Arelius]] in exchange for [[Eithan]] withdrawing from the tournament. Meanwhile, [[Yerin]] battles a powerful [[Remnant]] in a snowy village, only to be confronted by [[Yan Shoumei]] and [[Calan Archer]] from a [[Dreadgod cult]]. The encounter remains tense but non-violent as the group discusses their differing motivations and the nature of their advancement.}}
* '''Chapter 12:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|While escorting civilians, Kei and Maten Teia{{!}}Teia encounter a bandit ambush that [[Lindon]] swiftly neutralizes without killing the thieves. Later, [[Lindon]] captures a thief targeting [[Grace]] and recruits her to work for his team, all while managing the logistical pressures of earning points. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]] defending against a sudden attack by [[Prince Daji]] and [[Yerin]] having a profound, unsettling encounter with the [[Blood Shadow]].}}
* '''Chapter 13:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As [[Abyssal Palace cultists]] erect towers to capture [[Dreadgod madra]], [[Lindon]] tests a new technique by siphoning power and memories from a captured priest. While attempting to score points for his team, [[Lindon]] and [[Pride]] are ambushed by a [[high priest]] during a tower raid, resulting in [[Pride]] being wounded. To survive the encounter, [[Lindon]] activates his prototype armor, a unified weapon that allows him to channel multiple [[Enforcer techniques]] simultaneously.}}
* '''Chapter 14:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After [[Lindon]] uses a powerful, taxing armor to defeat [[Maraan]] and his second-in-command, he returns to the [[Akura clan]] where [[Charity]] proposes a marriage alliance with [[Grace]] to secure [[Lindon]]'s future influence. [[Lindon]] declines the proposal, expressing his singular interest in [[Yerin]], before being summoned by [[Northstrider]] for training and political briefings. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]] learning about the complex power structure of the The Eight-Man Empire{{!}}Eight-Man Empire and the high stakes surrounding the Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* '''Chapter 15:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|In a series of tournament matches, Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius ostentatiously throws two consecutive fights against [[Yan Shoumei]] to fulfill a secret deal with [[Akura Malice]]. Meanwhile, the damaged former [[Archlord]] [[Ziel]] fights a grueling duel against [[Brother Aekin]], nearly succeeding through sheer skill before his shattered spirit causes him to fail. Following his defeat, [[Eithan]] approaches a disillusioned [[Ziel]] with a suspicious contract offering the [[Pure Storm Baptism]] in exchange for a year of service.}}
* '''Chapter 16:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|In a high-stakes tournament, [[Mercy]] and Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara engage in a brutal multi-round duel that sees both combatants utilizing powerful techniques and temporary advancements to Overlord status. After an initial exchange where [[Mercy]] secures a victory, Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara advances her power and gains the upper hand in their second encounter. The chapter concludes with a desperate final clash where [[Mercy]]'s tactical maneuvers fail to prevent Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara from delivering a fatal blow.}}
* '''Chapter 17:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After [[Mercy]] loses her fight to Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara, [[Lindon]] breaks through security to offer the grieving girl sympathy before [[Yerin]] arrives to continue the tournament. In her match against [[Calan Archer]], [[Yerin]] struggles with her concentration and her [[Blood Shadow]]'s interference but ultimately wins by using the [[Endless Sword]] to split [[Calan]] in two. The victory is hard-fought, leaving [[Yerin]] grappling with the pressure of her master's legacy and the unsettling hunger of her own spirit.}}
* '''Chapter 18:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Following [[Yerin]]'s victory, the [[Akura clan]] decides to focus all resources on her training, including managing her volatile [[Blood Shadow]]. Meanwhile, [[Malice]] publicly shames [[Mercy]] for her defeat before transporting [[Lindon]], [[Eithan]], [[Fury]], and [[Mercy]] toward [[Sky's Edge]] via a cloudship. As they approach the battlefield where multiple [[Heralds]] and sects are clashing, [[Lindon]] forms a new contract with [[Little Blue]] to increase his power.}}
* '''Chapter 19:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After [[Lindon]], [[Eithan]], and [[Mercy]] arrive via cloudship to rescue the battered Akura prime team{{!}}Akura team from a [[dragon]]-led tournament, [[Lindon]] uses his [[pure madra]] and hunger arm to dominate a Silent Servants{{!}}Silent Servant in combat. Following the skirmish, [[Pride]] entrusts [[Lindon]] with the [[Diamond Veins]] to prepare for future hunting. Meanwhile, [[Yerin]] receives several powerful prizes from various factions, including a time-dilated training dimension from [[Northstrider]] and a Heart's Gem from the [[Blood Sage]], which she uses to prepare for her upcoming semifinal match.}}
* '''Chapter 20:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara reflects on her spiritual instability and the various prizes she has received from tournament competitors, noting her resentment toward [[Northstrider]] and the [[Akura clan]]. Meanwhile, [[Seishen Daji]] attempts to lead a team to destroy an [[Abyssal Palace tower]] but is intercepted by [[Lindon Arelius]] and [[Meira]], leading to a confrontation where [[Daji]] is incapacitated. In a separate location, [[Yerin]] undergoes intensive training and receives the [[Madra Engine]] from [[Charity]] to prepare for her advancement to Overlord.}}
* '''Chapter 21:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Monarchs]] [[Northstrider]] and [[Malice]] manipulate an [[Abidan]] meeting to secure a mutual restriction that confines them to [[Ninecloud City]], allowing them to advance their secret plans. Meanwhile, [[Yerin Arelius]] suffers a defeat against [[Yan Shoumei]] and her powerful [[Blood Shadow]], [[Crusher]], prompting a tense discussion with [[Charity]] and [[Min Shuei]] regarding how to win the next fight. To improve their coordination for the upcoming battle, [[Yerin]] decides to bond with her [[Blood Shadow]] by giving it the name [[Ruby]].}}
* '''Chapter 22:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] and her [[Blood Shadow]], [[Ruby]], defeat [[Yan Shoumei]] in a two-stage battle involving the [[Archlord]] weapons [[Netherclaw]] and a bow. Following the victory, [[Yerin]] is brought to a private room to meet [[Akura Malice]], who offers her immense rewards for winning the tournament while warning her of the consequences of failure. [[Malice]] advises [[Yerin]] on the necessity of developing her own unique signature to eventually manifest a [[Sword Icon]].}}
* '''Chapter 23:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara defeats [[Brother Aekin]], [[Yerin]] is awarded the [[Moonlight Bridge]], a [[Divine Treasure]] capable of near-instant global transportation. During a conversation with her [[Blood Shadow]], [[Ruby]], the treasure activates and allows [[Ruby]] to manifest a physical body to visit [[Lindon]]. Upon reuniting with [[Lindon]], [[Ruby]] suggests he seek permission from the [[Herald]] [[Fury]] to drain [[madra]] from the [[Wandering Titan]] to aid his advancement, a request [[Fury]] eventually grants after testing [[Lindon]]'s resolve.}}
* '''Chapter 24:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] achieves her Overlord advancement after a heated confrontation with the [[Winter Sage]], discovering her revelation is that she is not her predecessor. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]], [[Ruby]], [[Mercy]], [[Eithan]], and [[Pride]] travel toward the [[Wandering Titan]] to execute a plan involving Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm{{!}}Lindon's Remnant hand. During the attempt to harvest [[madra]], [[Lindon]] experiences a terrifying vision of the [[Dreadgod]]'s memories, realizing that when the [[Titan]] awakens, it will head straight for [[Sacred Valley]].}}
* '''Chapter 25:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After waking in a medical center, [[Lindon]] learns that the [[Dreadgod]] is heading toward his home in [[Sacred Valley]], prompting him to seek a way to warn them. Meanwhile, the [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]] assigns [[Calan Archer]] and his companions a mission to assassinate [[Malice]]'s children following the tournament. In the arena, [[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]] fight a brutal battle against Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara, which ends in tragedy when [[Yerin]] is killed by [[Sophara's Archlord weapon]].}}
* '''Chapter 26:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After failing her second fight against Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara, [[Yerin]] decides to recklessly fuse her spirit with the [[Blood Shadow]], [[Ruby]], resulting in a transformation that grants her boundless [[madra]] and the abilities of a [[Herald]]. This new power allows [[Yerin]] to defeat Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara in their subsequent matches, securing her victory as the eighteenth [[Uncrowned King]]. Meanwhile, amidst the tension of the tournament, [[Akura Fury]] reveals he has ascended to [[Monarch]] by manifesting the [[Strength Icon]], initiating a massive battle against the surrounding forces.}}
* '''Chapter 27:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As the tournament ends, a massive battle erupts in [[Ninecloud City]] between the [[Monarchs]] and various [[Heralds]], including [[Akura Fury]]'s violent ascent to power. Amidst the chaos, the [[Blood Sage]] uses a teleportation anchor to kidnap [[Akura Mercy]] and [[Pride]], leading [[Eithan]] and [[Lindon]] into a desperate series of combat encounters within a remote tower. After fighting through waves of enemies and witnessing the deaths of several allies, [[Lindon]] successfully breaches the tower to reunite with the survivors and confront Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara.}}
* '''Chapter 28:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses the powerful arrow [[Penance]] to instantly kill the [[Dragon King]], [[Seshethkunaaz]], during a massive battle. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] defeats Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara by consuming her power and manifests the [[Void Icon]], earning a [[wintersteel badge]] marked '[[Empty]].' After regrouping with [[Eithan]] and [[Yerin]], [[Lindon]]'s team secures new cloudships and prepares to depart for home.}}

== Characters ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Winter Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wandering Titan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ziel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Pride]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blood Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Overlord (Cradle)]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud Soul]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Emriss Silentborn]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Miara]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sage of Red Faith]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Adama]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blacksword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Demon of Twin Blades]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Suriel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Suu]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Meira]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shoumei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon Arelius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Daji]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dragon King]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[high priest]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Weeping Dragon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Frozen Blade]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Xorrus]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Leiala]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Timaias Adama]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shen]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Douji]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kelsa]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sword Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin Arelius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Silent King]]}}

== Locations & groups ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura clan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blackflame Empire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seishen Kingdom]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud Court]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sacred Valley]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abidan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Hall]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heralds]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Frozen Blade school]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Monarchs]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Stormcallers]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[House Arelius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Arelius family]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Night Wheel Valley]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Silent Servants]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Moongrave]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreadgod cults]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Gold dragons]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven’s Glory School]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven's Glory]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ancestor's Tomb]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Rosegold continent]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sundown Pavilion]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura guest tower]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|separated space}}

== Abilities & sacred arts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sword Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruler technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Striker technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[hunger madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Consume]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Endless Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heart of Twin Stars]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[dream aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Soul Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Empty Palm]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[blood madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[dragon’s breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Hollow Domain]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Forged madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wind aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blood aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Striker techniques]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Strings of Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Archlord binding]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Hollow Spear]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dream of Darkness]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Forger technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[sword aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Enforcer technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Steelborn body]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[script-circle]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[black dragon's breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Nightworm Venom]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Final Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dark Tide Incantation]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Stone Anchor]]}}

== Artifacts & constructs ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Moonlight Bridge]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Thousand-Mile Cloud]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[void key]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[dream tablets]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Totem of the Dragon King]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Divine Treasure]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Madra Engine]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Remnant]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura family cloudship]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Imperial Aegis]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Book of Eternal Night]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[natural treasures]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heart’s Gem]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|pure core}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wavedancer]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|hunger arm}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Broken Crown]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Jadeclaw Rings]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heart-Piercer Fruit]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace collection towers]]}}

== Events & concepts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blood Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Uncrowned King Tournament]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Archlord]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Monarch]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Uncrowned]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreadgod]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreadgods]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Underlord]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Herald]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Bleeding Phoenix]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blackflame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ghostwater]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[pure madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Diamond Veins]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Truegold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Iron body]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lowgold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Underlady]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lords]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Overlord revelation]]}}

== Sources ==
* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cradle
* https://openlibrary.org/works/OL22479475W

{{Willverse books nav}}

[[Category:Books]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
